missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When the current time matches the set alarm time, the alarm starts ringing.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall start ringing the alarm when the current time matches the set alarm time.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall be in an off state initially.
hallucinations.reason: The source text states 'The alarm starts in an off condition,' not 'The system starts in an off state.'

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall ensure that the user shall be able to turn off the activated alarm.
hallucinations.reason: The source text says 'the user can also turn it off again if needed,' which is less formal.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall support after stopping the alarm, the system shall remain active for the next scheduled alarm time.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the system remains active for the next scheduled alarm time after stopping it. It only mentions that the user can stop it and the alarm remains active for the next time.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall support when the current time matches the set alarm time, the system shall start ringing the alarm.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is a direct rewrite of the source text and does not introduce ambiguity.
